documentation.value: Gets the value of a key. Returns nil if the key does not exist. Only works for string values.
The key to retrieve.

signatures.label: SET key value [EX seconds | PX milliseconds] [NX | XX] [KEEPTTL] -> OK | nil

documentation.value: Sets the string value of a key. Overwrites any existing value regardless of its type.
The key to set.
The value to store.
Optional. Set the expiration time in seconds.
NX: Only set if key does not exist. XX: Only set if key already exists.
Removes one or more keys. Returns the number of keys that were removed.
One or more keys to delete.
Returns the value associated with a field in a hash stored at key.
The key of the hash.
The field to retrieve from the hash.

signatures.label: HSET key field value [field value ...] -> integer

documentation.value: Sets one or more field-value pairs in a hash. Returns the number of new fields added.
The key of the hash.
The field name.
The value to set for the field.
Inserts one or more elements at the head (left) of a list. Returns the new list length.
The key of the list.
One or more elements to push. Multiple elements are inserted left to right.
Inserts one or more elements at the tail (right) of a list. Returns the new list length.
The key of the list.
One or more elements to push to the right end.
Returns elements from a list within the specified range. 0 is the first element, -1 is the last.
The key of the list.
The start index (0-based, negative values count from the end).
The stop index (inclusive, -1 means the last element).
Adds one or more members to a set. Returns the number of new members added (excluding duplicates).
The key of the set.
One or more members to add.
Returns all members of a set stored at key.
The key of the set.

signatures.label: ZADD key [NX | XX] [GT | LT] [CH] score member [score member ...] -> integer

documentation.value: Adds one or more members to a sorted set with scores. Returns the number of new members.
The key of the sorted set.
The score for ranking (double-precision floating point).
The member to add.
NX: Only add new elements. XX: Only update existing elements.

signatures.label: ZRANGE key min max [BYSCORE | BYLEX] [REV] [LIMIT offset count] [WITHSCORES] -> list

documentation.value: Returns members of a sorted set within the specified range, ordered by score.
The key of the sorted set.
The minimum score or index.
The maximum score or index.
Optional. Include scores in the output.

signatures.label: EXPIRE key seconds [NX | XX | GT | LT] -> integer

documentation.value: Sets a timeout on a key. After the timeout, the key is automatically deleted. Returns 1 if set, 0 if key doesn't exist.
The key to set the expiration on.
The timeout in seconds.
Returns the remaining time to live of a key in seconds. Returns -1 if no expiry, -2 if key doesn't exist.
The key to check.
Returns all keys matching the given glob-style pattern. WARNING: Use SCAN in production to avoid blocking.
A glob-style pattern (e.g., 'user:*', 'session:????', 'h[ae]llo').
Returns PONG if no argument is provided. Otherwise returns a copy of the message. Used to test connectivity.
Optional. A message string to echo back.
